current.summary: Use token refresh retry instead of widening timeout.
current.evidence: Auth logs show 401 immediately after refresh.

semantic_delta.from: The team suspected a network timeout.
semantic_delta.to: The evidence points to a token refresh race.
semantic_delta.why: The failure appears immediately after refresh rather than after a long timeout.
semantic_delta.evidence: 401 appears after refresh success in auth logs.

connect_to.why: The decision directly addresses the observed token refresh race.
connect_to.evidence: Auth logs show 401 immediately after a successful token refresh.
